$curated: State-composition gate for library (Template B — library.gen.json has 0 MxCard; the deck tiles are a dynamic runtime list keyed deckTile-<id>, not literal mx-node:library/node-N, so assert the keyed CONTAINER set per state). Chrome (screen/appbar) excluded (matches dashboard.states.json). UNIVERSE is intentionally just the two true state-discriminators that are BOTH keyed in the FE AND state-scoped per the kit derivation: library/empty-deck (empty only) and library/retry (error only). The toolbar controls (search-btn/sort-btn/create) ARE keyed but the FE renders them in EVERY state (a stable toolbar), whereas the kit scopes search/sort into library/context — the with-data body — and derives create only in loaded; so they are neither state-discriminating in the FE nor a subset of derived[empty]/derived[error]. Including them would fail both states_check (curated ⊆ derived) and the FE composition loop. They are documented as intentional divergences in tool/parity/intent-ledger.json (search-btn/sort-btn = behavior toolbar-always; create = styleExempt) and locked by a targeted test (toolbar controls present in empty+error). loaded=[] asserts neither the empty-state CTA nor the error CTA leaks into the populated list; the deck tiles themselves are the identity-rollout gap (dynamic key) covered by test/presentation/features/deck/library_screen_test.dart. COVERAGE GAPS (7, not gated): search-active (search is a separate /search route, no in-screen dock), pair-picker (no keyed pair control in the FE library), sort-menu (sort-btn opens a showModalBottomSheet of ListTiles, not keyed sort-0..3), overflow-menu (overflow consolidated into the shared Drawer — ledger exception), play-sheet (a deck-detail flow, not library), drawer (shell-owned), loading (MxStateView.loading skeleton, no keyed body node). Cross-checked by test/presentation/features/deck/library_states_test.dart.
